message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam noteBorderColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC

participant "finest level" as F
participant "intermediate level(s)" as I
participant "base level" as B

hnote over F : U(k,2) -> F(U(k,2))

F -> F : SDC
hnote over F : U(k',2) -> F(U(k',2))

F -> I : restrict
hnote over I : U(k,1) -> F(U(k,1))

I -> I : FAS
hnote over I : tau = Q(1)*F(U(k,1)) – R*Q(2)*F(U(k',2))

I -> I : SDC with FAS
hnote over I : U(k',1) -> F(U(k',1))

I -> B : restrict
hnote over B : U(k,0) -> F(U(k,0))

B -> B : FAS
hnote over B : tau = Q(0)*F(U(k,0)) – R*Q(1)*F(U(k',1))

B -> B : SDC with FAS
hnote over B : U(k+,0) -> F(U(k+,0))

B -> B : coarse correction
hnote over B : c(0) = U(k+,0) – R*U(k',1)

B -> I : prolongate

I -> I : correct
hnote over I : U(k'',1) = U(k',1) + P*c(0)

I -> I : SDC
hnote over I : U(k+,1) -> F(U(k+,1))

I -> I : coarse correction
hnote over I : c(1) = U(k+,1) – R*U(k',2)

I -> F : prolongate

F -> F : correct
hnote over F : U(k'',2) = U(k',2) + P*c(1)

F -> F : SDC
hnote over F : U(k+,2) -> F(U(k+,2))

@enduml
